generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values duty and order, you know how important our alliances are for national security. But have you considered how much we're really carrying the burden? New reports show our partners aren't pulling their weight in joint defense spending. It's time we make sure our commitments are fair and sustainable. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitments
